snippet.title: Tessica Brown‚Äôs Gorilla Glue Hair Nightmare Fixed by Surgeon
snippet.description: Tessica Brown earned national notoriety for coating her hair with Gorilla Glue spray after running out of hairspray. She tried washing it out with oils and shampoo and even went to the emergency room, but nothing worked. Her pleas for help went viral on TikTok. That‚Äôs when Beverly Hills plastic surgeon Dr. Michael Obeng stepped in to help. Brown flew from her home in Louisiana to Los Angeles, where she underwent a procedure to dissolve the glue under light anesthesia.
tags: woman with gorilla glue in hair

snippet.title: MAN UNITED 3-3 EVERTON | PREMIER LEAGUE HIGHLIGHTS
snippet.description:
Dominic Calvert-Lewin rescued a late point for Everton at Old Trafford to make it seven away games without defeat. Carlo Ancelotti's side found themselves 2-0 down at half-time via goals from Edinson Cavani and Bruno Fernandes, but Abdoulaye Doucour√© and James Rodriguez struck after the break. Scott McTominay thought he'd won it for Manchester United, until Calvert-Lewin steered home his 13th Premier League goal of the season in the 95th minute.

localized.title: MAN UNITED 3-3 EVERTON | PREMIER LEAGUE HIGHLIGHTS
localized.description:
Dominic Calvert-Lewin rescued a late point for Everton at Old Trafford to make it seven away games without defeat. Carlo Ancelotti's side found themselves 2-0 down at half-time via goals from Edinson Cavani and Bruno Fernandes, but Abdoulaye Doucour√© and James Rodriguez struck after the break. Scott McTominay thought he'd won it for Manchester United, until Calvert-Lewin steered home his 13th Premier League goal of the season in the 95th minute.

snippet.title: Tessica Brown Tears Up After Surgery to Remove Gorilla Glue From Her Hair
snippet.description:
Tessica Brown, who went viral after using Gorilla Glue as hairspray, flew to Los Angeles, where plastic surgeon Dr. Michael Obeng removed the glue free of charge. The 40-year-old mom of five gets emotional after the procedure, running her fingers through her freed hair for the first time in weeks.

snippet.title: Al Ahly v Palmeiras | FIFA Club World Cup Qatar 2020 | Match Highlights
snippet.description:
CAF Champions League kings Al Ahly SC recorded a penalty shoot-out win over Copa Libertadores winners SE Palmeiras in the FIFA Club World Cup Qatar 2020 match for third place. Mohamed El Shenaway saved two penalties in the shootout as the Egyptian side marked their best finish at the Club World Cup since 2006. 

To watch the FIFA Club World Cup Qatar 2020 final live, please check your local listings:
http://fifa.fans/3riz2Vm

https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCpcTrCXblq78GZrTUTLWeBw?sub_confirmation=1

lMusician, Okesse 1 and radio show host, Andy Dosty are in the news after the latter drove the former out of the studio on live radio.
During the live taping of ‚ÄúDaybreak Hitz,‚Äù the astute radio DJ and Okesse 1 engaged in an exchange of words which called for the abrupt end of the musician‚Äôs interview. According to Andy, Okesse 1 was rude to him when he entered the studios of Hitz FM.
In a video that is trending on social media, Andy Dosty asked Okesse 1 if he‚Äôs ok to which the musician responded, ‚Äúwhy are you asking me that question.‚Äù His response did not sit well with Andy which led him to probe further.

snippet.description:
Former President Trump released a brief statement saying "this has been another phase of the greatest witch hunt in history." #FoxNews

Subscribe to Fox News! https://bit.ly/2vBUvAS
Watch more Fox News Video: http://video.foxnews.com
Watch Fox News Channel Live: http://www.foxnewsgo.com/

FOX News Channel (FNC) is a 24-hour all-encompassing news service delivering breaking news as well as political and business news. The number one network in cable, FNC has been the most-watched television news channel for 18 consecutive years. According to a 2020 Brand Keys Consumer Loyalty Engagement Index report, FOX News is the top brand in the country for morning and evening news coverage. A 2019 Suffolk University poll named FOX News as the most trusted source for television news or commentary, while a 2019 Brand Keys Emotion Engagement Analysis survey found that FOX News was the most trusted cable news brand. A 2017 Gallup/Knight Foundation survey also found that among Americans who could name an objective news source, FOX News was the top-cited outlet. Owned by FOX Corporation, FNC is available in nearly 90 million homes and dominates the cable news landscape, routinely notching the top ten programs in the genre.

snippet.title: School Admission - Part 2 (Mark Angel Comedy) (Episode 298)
snippet.description:
Success is seeking admission in a new school as her former school has no more teachers since due to her stubbornness, the headmaster had fired all the school teachers, but for her to be offered admission, she must pass an Oral IQ test. 

His uncle Kbrown is not OK with an oral text as he recommends a written test, but the headmaster insist. 

Success affirms she is ready for the test as the headmaster promises the text won't take much time. She is then asked what she would do assuming she was in the principal's shoes and she found N50million naira on her bed and her answer to the question shocked the principal.


Please don't forget to subscribe to Mark Angel Comedy Official YouTube Channel and turn on NOTIFICATION:

http://goo.gl/gnzgW3

http://www.youtube.com/MarkAngelComedy

GOD BLESS YOU, WE LOVE YOU. Enjoy!

#admission  #schooladmission #Emanuella #AuntySuccess #Success #DenilsonIgwe 
#NigerianComedy #NigerianComedy2021 #Chukwuemeka

snippet.title: Godzilla vs. Kong ‚Äì Official Trailer
snippet.description:
In theaters and streaming exclusively on @HBOMax* March 26.
¬Ý
*Available on @HBOMax in the US only, for 31 days, at no extra cost to subscribers.

https://www.godzillavskong.com/
https://www.facebook.com/GodzillaVsKong
https://www.instagram.com/godzillavskong/
https://twitter.com/GodzillaVsKong

---

From Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures comes the long-awaited face-off between two icons, ‚ÄúGodzilla vs. Kong,‚Äù the next epic adventure in Legendary‚Äôs cinematic Monsterverse, directed by Adam Wingard.

Legends collide in ‚ÄúGodzilla vs. Kong‚Äù as these mythic adversaries meet in a spectacular battle for the ages, with the fate of the world hanging in the balance.  Kong and his protectors undertake a perilous journey to find his true home, and with them is Jia, a young orphaned girl with whom he has formed a unique and powerful bond.  But they unexpectedly find themselves in the path of an enraged Godzilla, cutting a swath of destruction across the globe.  The epic clash between the two titans‚Äîinstigated by unseen forces‚Äîis only the beginning of the mystery that lies deep within the core of the Earth.

The film stars Alexander Skarsg√•rd (‚ÄúBig Little Lies,‚Äù ‚ÄúThe Little Drummer Girl‚Äù), Millie Bobby Brown (‚ÄúStranger Things‚Äù), Rebecca Hall (‚ÄúChristine,‚Äù ‚ÄúProfessor Marston and the Wonder Women‚Äù), Brian Tyree Henry (‚ÄúJoker,‚Äù ‚ÄúSpider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse‚Äù), Shun Oguri (‚ÄúWeathering with You‚Äù), Eiza Gonz√°lez (‚ÄúFast & Furious Presents: Hobbs & Shaw‚Äù), Julian Dennison (‚ÄúDeadpool 2‚Äù), with Kyle Chandler (‚ÄúGodzilla: King of the Monsters‚Äù) and Demi√°n Bichir (‚ÄúThe Nun,‚Äù ‚ÄúThe Hateful Eight‚Äù).
Wingard (‚ÄúThe Guest,‚Äù ‚ÄúYou‚Äôre Next‚Äù) directed from a screenplay by Eric Pearson (‚ÄúThor: Ragnarok‚Äù) and Max Borenstein (‚ÄúGodzilla: King of the Monsters,‚Äù ‚ÄúKong: Skull Island‚Äù), story by Terry Rossio (‚ÄúPirates of the Caribbean: Dead Men Tell No Tales‚Äù) and Michael Dougherty & Zach Shields (‚ÄúGodzilla: King of the Monsters‚Äù), based on the character ‚ÄúGodzilla‚Äù owned and created by TOHO CO., LTD.  The film was produced by Mary Parent, Alex Garcia, Eric McLeod, Jon Jashni, Thomas Tull and Brian Rogers, with Jay Ashenfelter, Herbert W. Gains, Dan Lin, Roy Lee, Yoshimitsu Banno and Kenji Okuhira executive producing.

The director‚Äôs behind-the-scenes creative team included director of photography Ben Seresin (‚ÄúThe Mummy,‚Äù ‚ÄúWorld War Z‚Äù), production designers Owen Paterson (‚ÄúJumanji: Welcome to the Jungle,‚Äù ‚ÄúGodzilla‚Äù) and Thomas S. Hammock (‚ÄúBlair Witch‚Äù), editor Josh Schaeffer (‚ÄúGodzilla: King of the Monsters‚Äù), costume designer Ann Foley (‚ÄúSkyscraper‚Äù) and visual effects supervisor John ‚ÄúDJ‚Äù DesJardin (upcoming ‚ÄúZack Snyder‚Äôs Justice League‚Äù).

Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures Present a Legendary Pictures Production, A Film By Adam Wingard, ‚ÄúGodzilla vs. Kong.‚Äù  The film will be released nationwide in 2D and 3D in select theaters and IMAX on March 26, 2021 and will be available in the U.S. on HBO Max for 31 days from theatrical release.  It is rated PG-13 for intense sequences of creature violence/destruction and brief language.

snippet.title: COBRA GIRL 2021 - New Hollywood Hindi Dubbed Action Movie | #Latest Released Hindi Dubbed Movie 2021
snippet.description:
Summaries:
Chanachol, recently returned to Thailand after living overseas, signs up for a tour to get back in touch with Thai culture, and finds himself attracted to the tour guide, Mekhala. There are several problems with the relationship: Chanachol is married, with family, and Mekhala has a mysterious, symbiotic relationship with a deadly cobra, and many of her previous suitors have ended up dead.
Director: M.L. Pundhevanop Dhewakul
Stars: Shahkrit Yamnarm, Karnpitchar Ketmanee, Jiravich Pongpaijit

snippet.title: Isaiah Song (feat. Chandler Moore) - Maverick City | TRIBL
snippet.description:
Official Music Video for "Isaiah Song" featuring Chandler Moore by Maverick City Music. 

"Isaiah Song" was written by Chandler Moore, Leamond Sloan, and Benita Jones. This video was captured by Maverick City at a live recording in 2020 at 1971 Sounds in Atlanta before COVID and safety restrictions were in place for larger gatherings.

snippet.title: WATCH: Harris escorts the Pences as they depart U.S. Capitol
snippet.description:
Skip to 12:49 to watch Harris and Emhoff escort the Pences down the Capitol steps.

Vice President Kamala Harris and second gentleman Douglas Emhoff escorted former Vice President Mike Pence and second lady Karen Pence to their departure from the U.S. Capitol after Harris and President Joe Biden were sworn in on Wednesday.

While former President Donald Trump never formally conceded to Biden, Pence called Harris to offer his congratulations and assistance in the transition five days ago.

snippet.title: Here's How Queen Elizabeth Responded To Biden's Inauguration
snippet.description:
Even though the setting is surely familiar, President Joe Biden and first lady Jill Biden are still surely getting used to actually living in their new White House digs. 

There are big things to attend to, like a mountain of executive orders. And then there are the details: The family pictures in the Oval Office. What rugs will the Bidens want in their living quarters? What color curtains will they have? Where and how will President Biden store his mail?

The new commander in chief is getting a lot of correspondence already. Perhaps surprisingly, outgoing President Donald Trump left a note for the new chief executive. Maybe even more surprisingly, Biden said,

"The president wrote a very generous letter."

There's also the letter that Amazon sent to the newly inaugurated president, offering to assist with upcoming COVID vaccination drives. And there's the "private message" that Queen Elizabeth sent to Biden ahead of his January 20th inauguration, The Sunday Times reported. 

Biden has received messages from many of the world's leaders, as they offer their congratulations and their hope for a path forward in U.S. foreign policy. U.K. Prime Minister Boris Johnson, in an interview with Sky News, said that the United States and the United Kingdom share a, quote, "joint united agenda" and that the new administration was "a fantastic thing for America." Was the queen's message similar, perhaps?

Vanity Fair says that Queen Elizabeth's letter will remain as private as President Trump's letter to Biden presumably will. While we can't guess as to the content of the letter, we can bet that it was personalized. Joe Biden is the 14th president to lead the U.S. during Queen Elizabeth's reign. And, considering her history with the other 13 sitting U.S. presidents, it's certain that the two will meet in the next four years. Perhaps the message extended an invitation to Buckingham Palace or Windsor Castle.

Or is it possible Joe and Jill Biden could pass the Balmoral Test? That's a very tentative maybe. According to Time, Queen Elizabeth has met with every U.S. president, with the exception of Lyndon B. Johnson, since she became queen in February 1952. In that time, only President Eisenhower was invited to her summer home of Balmoral Castle in Scotland.

This being said, Her Majesty is said to have been quite charmed by Barack Obama. Author Tom Quinn, who wrote Kensington Palace: An Intimate Memoir from Queen Mary to Meghan Markle, claims the queen developed a soft spot for America after meeting the 44th president. If that's the case, perhaps Queen Elizabeth associates President Obama's former vice president, Joe Biden, with his old boss, which can only be good. Over eight years, the Obamas visited with the queen three times.

When Queen Elizabeth began her reign, Harry S. Truman was president of the United States. The two had actually met a few months before, in October 1951, when the queen was still a princess. In addition to sitting U.S. presidents, The Heritage Foundation notes that Her Majesty also met President Herbert Hoover, who was in office from 1929 to 1933, prior to becoming queen.

The Independent notes that Queen Elizabeth and President Joe Biden have not yet met, though some outlets report otherwise. It's possible they exchanged pleasantries during Biden's 36 years in the U.S. Senate, but while serving as vice president from 2009 to 2017, Biden did not travel with the Obamas on their three state visits to the U.K., and the queen last visited the United States in 2007, then the guest of President George W. Bush and Laura Bush. 

Given all the rich history the queen has with America's leaders, it's not hard to imagine that her private message to President Biden was one of cordial friendship ‚Äî even if the two have yet to meet. With COVID-19 restrictions still firmly in place around the world, a visit between Queen Elizabeth and the 46th U.S. president will no doubt be delayed, but it will happen. It's tradition, after all. 

#QueenElizabeth #JoeBiden #Inauguration

Read Full Article: https://www.thelist.com/317367/heres-how-queen-elizabeth-responded-to-bidens-inauguration/

snippet.title: Yahweh (feat. Chandler Moore & Osby Berry) - Maverick City | TRIBL
snippet.description:
Official Music Video for "Yahweh featuring Chandler Moore & Osby Berry by Maverick City Music 

"Yahweh" was written by Aaron Moses, Dante Bowe, and Kierre Lindsey. This video was captured at a live recording at 1971 Sounds in Atlanta in 2020 before COVID and safety restrictions were in place for larger gatherings.

Maverick City Music Vol 3, part 2 is available everywhere you listen to music!
                                                  
For more live worship songs and moments, download the TRIBL app today: 
App Store -http://triblmusic.com/apple  
Google Play - http://triblmusic.com/google 

Follow us on socials:
Instagram - https://www.instagram.com/triblmusic/
Facebook - https://www.facebook.com/triblmusic/

TRIBL's mission is to be the home of live, moment-driven worship. We hope these songs and moments bring encounter with God's Presence and continue to be a place where His heart is revealed.
Let's unite the tribes, together.
